'''vozanaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:swallowtailed|swallowtailed]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-z-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:swallowtailed|swallowtailed]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| vozanaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:vozanithi|vozanithi]] || [[word:vozaniji|vozaniji]] || [[word:vozanishi|vozanishi]] || [[word:vozaniki|vozaniki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:vozanuthuthu|vozanuthuthu]] || [[word:vozanujuju|vozanujuju]] || [[word:vozanushushu|vozanushushu]] || [[word:vozanukuku|vozanukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:vozanuthu|vozanuthu]] || [[word:vozanuju|vozanuju]] || [[word:vozanushu|vozanushu]] || [[word:vozanuku|vozanuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:vozanufthuf|vozanufthuf]] || [[word:vozanufjuf|vozanufjuf]] || [[word:vozanufshuf|vozanufshuf]] || [[word:vozanufkuf|vozanufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:vozanethe|vozanethe]] || [[word:vozaneje|vozaneje]] || [[word:vozaneshe|vozaneshe]] || [[word:vozaneke|vozaneke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:vozanothotho|vozanothotho]] || [[word:vozanojojo|vozanojojo]] || [[word:vozanoshosho|vozanoshosho]] || [[word:vozanokoko|vozanokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:vozanotho|vozanotho]] || [[word:vozanojo|vozanojo]] || [[word:vozanosho|vozanosho]] || [[word:vozanoko|vozanoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:vozanofthof|vozanofthof]] || [[word:vozanofjof|vozanofjof]] || [[word:vozanofshof|vozanofshof]] || [[word:vozanofkof|vozanofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:vozanĂŻfthĂŻf|vozanĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:vozanĂŻfjĂŻf|vozanĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:vozanĂŻfshĂŻf|vozanĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:vozanĂŻfkĂŻf|vozanĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:vozanĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|vozanĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:vozanĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|vozanĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:vozanĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|vozanĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:vozanĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|vozanĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:vozanĂŻfthĂŻf|vozanĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:vozanĂŻfjĂŻf|vozanĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:vozanĂŻfshĂŻf|vozanĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:vozanĂŻfkĂŻf|vozanĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:vozanĂŻfthĂŻf|vozanĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:vozanĂŻfjĂŻf|vozanĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:vozanĂŻfshĂŻf|vozanĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:vozanĂŻfkĂŻf|vozanĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:vozanĂŠthĂŠ|vozanĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:vozanĂŠjĂŠ|vozanĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:vozanĂŠshĂŠ|vozanĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:vozanĂŠkĂŠ|vozanĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:vozanathatha|vozanathatha]] || [[word:vozanajaja|vozanajaja]] || [[word:vozanashasha|vozanashasha]] || [[word:vozanakaka|vozanakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:vozanatha|vozanatha]] || [[word:vozanaja|vozanaja]] || [[word:vozanasha|vozanasha]] || [[word:vozanaka|vozanaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:vozanafthaf|vozanafthaf]] || [[word:vozanafjaf|vozanafjaf]] || [[word:vozanafshaf|vozanafshaf]] || [[word:vozanafkaf|vozanafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:vozanasha|vozanasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:vozanshĂ«sha|vozanshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:vozanrosha|vozanrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:vozanmusha|vozanmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:vozanyasha|vozanyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govozankshĂ«sha|govozankshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govozankrosha|govozankrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govozankmusha|govozankmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:govozankyasha|govozankyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:vozazanasha|vozazanasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:vozazanshĂ«sha|vozazanshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:vozazanrosha|vozazanrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:vozazanmusha|vozazanmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:vozazanyasha|vozazanyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govozazankshĂ«sha|govozazankshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govozazankrosha|govozazankrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govozazankmusha|govozazankmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:govozazankyasha|govozazankyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:vezĂŠnasha|vezĂŠnasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:vezĂŠnshĂ«sha|vezĂŠnshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:vezĂŠnrosha|vezĂŠnrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:vezĂŠnmusha|vezĂŠnmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:vezĂŠnyasha|vezĂŠnyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govezĂŠnkshĂ«sha|govezĂŠnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govezĂŠnkrosha|govezĂŠnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govezĂŠnkmusha|govezĂŠnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:govezĂŠnkyasha|govezĂŠnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:vozfanasha|vozfanasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:vozfanshĂ«sha|vozfanshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:vozfanrosha|vozfanrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:vozfanmusha|vozfanmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:vozfanyasha|vozfanyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govozfankshĂ«sha|govozfankshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govozfankrosha|govozfankrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govozfankmusha|govozfankmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:govozfankyasha|govozfankyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c715ec1}}
